title: National Cyber Security Strategy 2025-2030
description: Official strategy PDF from AKSK (National Cyber Security Authority of Albania). Mentions 'quantum computing' and 'quantum cryptography' only as emerging/advanced technologies in a general list (alongside AI, LLMs, blockchain). Does NOT mention post-quantum cryptography, quantum-safe/quantum-resistant algorithms, PQC, or migration. Fails explicit-PQC threshold.

title: The National Cyber Security Strategy 2025-2030 and Action Plan are approved - AKSK
description: AKSK news page announcing approval of the 2025-2030 strategy and Action Plan 2025-2027; aligns with NIS2, eIDAS2, EUCC. References cryptography under innovation/research but no explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe content.

title: National Cyber Security Strategy - AKSK
description: AKSK landing page for the national cyber security strategy. No explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography content.

title: Miratohet Strategjia Kombëtare për Sigurinë Kibernetike 2025-2030 dhe Plani i Veprimit
description: Albanian business-magazine article on approval of the 2025-2030 strategy. Journalism (non-institutional). Mentions cryptography/AI but no explicit PQC.

title: About Us - AKCESK / Autoriteti Kombetar Per Certifikimin Elektronik
description: National Authority for Electronic Certification and Cyber Security (AKCESK) institutional page on cesk.gov.al. Trust services / electronic certification remit; no explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography content found.

title: Higjiena kibernetike për institucionet publike dhe NVM-të (Cyber hygiene guidance)
description: AKCESK cyber-hygiene guidance PDF for public institutions and SMEs. General cybersecurity hygiene; no explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography content.
